Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There seems to be no one inside...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's someone inside...[n]Should I talk to them...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry, but I'm busy. Could you come back later?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3075 0 0}Come on, that's enough. I asked you to come back later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sanada doesn't seem to be in his room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sanada seems to be studying.[n]I shouldn't bother him...[n]{f 1 1}
